// purpose: MCP servers Claude Code should auto-start on session boot.
// schema: Each entry under mcpServers is a server definition; type=stdio uses the package's bin entry; type=http for HTTP transports.

chrome-devtools.// what: Drives a headless Chrome via the Chrome DevTools Protocol. Exposes screenshot, accessibility tree, network monitor, page navigation, console capture as MCP tools — tighter and faster than DOM scraping.
chrome-devtools.// when: Use when an audit / screenshot / a11y-tree task needs CDP-level access to the demo at fpkg.fly.dev.
chrome-devtools.// flags: Sandbox-friendly defaults: --headless, --isolated (clean profile per session), --acceptInsecureCerts (some sandbox CA stores miss public roots). --executablePath points at the Playwright-installed Chromium so we don't need a separate Chrome install. --chromeArg=--no-sandbox / --disable-dev-shm-usage are required for chrome to launch inside this rootful container.
